bias.description: does not build CDF packages, validation verdicts, receipts, checkpoints, or mirrors
generates TLC-shaped Arrow batches rather than reading source Parquet bytes
uses the DuckDB crate Arrow type directly; CDF destination crosses the pinned Arrow C stream bridge

reference.name: duckdb
reference.semantic_work: persistent DuckDB Arrow appender over synthetic TLC-shaped batches with CDF row provenance column and checkpoint
